meaning: adj.男性的,男的,有男子气概的,精力充沛的
examples: He wanted his sons to become strong, virile, and athletic like himself.
This role represents a man of virile or rough character like warriors.
The role of a virile, axe-wielding, fur-bearing, cranium-smashing barbarian suited Schwarzenegger to a tee.
It isn't as if these virile athletes have discovered that deep down they're actually softies.
